response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/mobile software developer but lacks the hardware-adjacent expertise this Principal Performance Architect role demands. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator work, deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD experience, or hardware-software co-design. Background is primarily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang application development, not silicon performance architecture.
strengths: Long tenure with senior/staff-level software engineering roles
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong testing discipline and craftsmanship culture
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No deep-learning, AI accelerator, or GPU workload optimization background
No advanced degree (PhD/MS) and no demonstrated equivalent in performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No deep-learning / GPU performance optimization background
